# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates the engine to Skia milestone m151 and ships a wave of managed-code performance improvements. Key wins include zero-allocation HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, zero-copy SKShaper glyph spans, and managed-code colour conversions. WebAssembly gains Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries for .NET 11 WASM. Several upstream chrome/m151 bug-fix syncs are included.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upgraded to Skia milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine is now built from the m151 branch, bringing the latest upstream rendering features and fixes. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Four rounds of chrome/m151 upstream bug fixes** — Stability and correctness patches from the Skia team's chrome/m151 branch have been merged in four incremental syncs. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443), [#4489](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4489))
- **CPU raster regression fixed** — Restored SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to resolve a CPU-side rasterisation regression introduced after the m151 upgrade. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimised with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — Parsing SKColor from hex strings is faster and allocation-free, and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads avoid string allocation at call sites. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **Unsafe modifier removed from GRContextOptions** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, making it usable in projects without unsafe code enabled. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) leaked a native handle when the crop rectangle was outside the image bounds. The leak has been fixed. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **WASM build compatibility restored for SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM** — A macro redefinition that broke WASM builds in certain toolchain configurations has been removed from the Skia submodule. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Broad managed-code performance improvements across hot paths** — SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion, SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply, SKFourByteTag.Parse, and HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse are all ported to managed integer math, eliminating P/Invoke round-trips on each call. HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses pooled UTF-8 encoding with no per-call allocation, and SKShaper glyph results are read via zero-copy spans. ([#4370](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4370), [#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Platform

- **WebAssembly support for .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.0.6** — Pre-built Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included, enabling SkiaSharp to run on .NET 11 WASM with the new exnref exception-handling model. A CI test job validates WASM behaviour on preview .NET builds. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459), [#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487), [#4488](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4488))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 ships with this release; the Tag.Parse hot path is now allocation-free.

## Release Candidate 1 (July 21, 2026)

Release Candidate 1 added .NET 11 WASM support via Emscripten 5.0.6, fixed the native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData, resolved the CPU raster regression, and pulled in the final chrome/m151 upstream fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.2.1...v4.151.0-rc.1.1)

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered a broad performance sweep — allocation-free HarfBuzz encoding, zero-copy SKShaper spans, managed colour conversions, and an upstream m151 bug-fix sync.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151.0 line with the Skia m151 engine upgrade.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
